$comment: Wipe-equivalence script — the engine-level twin of prototypes/e2e/invalidation.spec.js: add a claim while hadClaims is yes, flip to no (the scope-exit wipe destroys the claim data), flip back to yes. The end-state must hold NO claim fulfilments in either flow — data destroyed, not hidden, never rehydrated (SHAPE-19, INDEX-21).
name: claims-yes-no-yes
